Game Hand #1009 - Tournament #900000001 - Holdem(No Limit) - Level 6 (50.00/100.00)- 2026/06/25 17:08:00 UTC
Table '1' 6-max Seat #6 is the button
Seat 1: vill1 (10000.00)
Seat 2: vill2 (10000.00)
Seat 3: vill3 (10000.00)
Seat 4: vill4 (10000.00)
Seat 5: vill5 (10000.00)
Seat 6: hero (10000.00)
vill1 posts the small blind 50.00
vill2 posts the big blind 100.00
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to hero [Ah Kh]
vill3 folds
vill4 folds
vill5 folds
hero raises 250.00 to 250.00
vill1 folds
vill2 calls 150.00
*** FLOP *** [Kd 7s 2h]
Main pot 550.00
hero bets 275.00
vill2 calls 275.00
*** TURN *** [Kd 7s 2h] [3c]
Main pot 1100.00
hero checks
vill2 checks
*** RIVER *** [Kd 7s 2h 3c] [9d]
Main pot 1100.00
hero checks
vill2 checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Main pot 1100.00
hero shows [Ah Kh] (a pair of Kings)
vill2 shows [Qh Jh] (high card)
hero collected 1100.00 from main pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 1100.00
Board [Kd 7s 2h 3c 9d]
Seat 6: hero (button) showed [Ah Kh] and won 1100.00 with a pair of Kings
Seat 2: vill2 (big blind) mucked
